_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Analyze information to determine, recommend, and plan the development of a new application or modification of an existing application.
reference_document_element_description: Execute analytical requests from business stakeholders, including data extraction, transformation, analysis, and delivery of findings with documented methodology.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-001 (OP, cosine: 0.503), TF-A-003 (TF, cosine: 0.489).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.558). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [analyze, application, determine, development, existing, information] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, analytical, business, data, delivery, documented] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.876, R=0.874). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Analyze information to determine, recommend, and plan the development of a new a" and "Execute analytical requests from business stakeholders, including data extractio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.518 ≈ STS 0.558 (gap 0.039). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.1%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [analyze, application, determine, development, existing, information]. WIDAI terms: [analysis, analytical, business, data, delivery, documented].
